calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Re: Distribution From Intervivos Trust
Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Bassin for and with Fanyela Weingberg and Harry Hattyar. Andrew Wilson for and with Adrian Ionescu-Amsens. Olga Ionescu also present.

The Court stated that the will excersizes power of appointment, that the will has been admitted and that the property passes through the Trust by way of power of appointment. The Court will review the proposed order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition For Instructions Re: Distribution From Intervivos Trust
Off Calendar Apr-13-2011 Continued To Aug-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-11-294200 Estate of Ana Dimitrescu.

Appearances: Scott Bassin for and with Fanyela Weinberg. Andrew Wilson for Danny Ansems.

There is no objection to the petition for probate by any Party. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. The Petition for Instructions on the Trust matter was continued to August 24, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For Instructions Re: Distribution From Intervivos Trust
Off Calendar Mar-30-2011 Continued To Apr-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Re: Distribution From Intervivos Trust
Off Calendar Mar-16-2011 Continued To Mar-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Re: Distribution From Intervivos Trust
Off Calendar Mar-02-2011 Continued To Mar-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Re: Distribution From Intervivos Trust
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Continued To Mar-02-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Bassin for and with Fanyela Weinberg and Harry Hattyar.

Mr. Bassin stated that he was treating the will as the exercise of power of appointment, that the Estate has no money which is why they did not probate the will and that all of the assets are in the Trust. The Court stated that the will should be probated and continued the Petition for Instructions to March 2, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Probate is to have a hearing date of March 2, 2011 as well.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
